name: Integer Addition & Subtraction

hooks.visual: Walking forward and backward on a number line — what happens when you change direction?
hooks.question: What does it mean to take away a debt? Could removing something negative actually be a good thing?

realWorldContext: Every time you gain or lose points in a game, go up or down floors in a building, or track money earned and spent, you are adding and subtracting integers. Understanding these operations unlocks how the world keeps score.
reflectionPrompt: Why does subtracting a negative number give the same result as adding a positive?
